block_21: Most Profitable Trade of the Week
block_46: Olympics pin trading is as much a part of the action as the sports themselves. The first Olympic pins date back to the first Summer Games in Athens in 1896. Everyone from athletes to viewers and media participates in the pin trading tradition. The most coveted pin is known to be from the London Olympics 2012, with a tiny Pikachu.
